title: You Raise Me Up
why_this_song: You Raise Me Up by Josh Groban (2003) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "You raise me up, so I can stand on mountains"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "You raise me up, so I can stand on mountains"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "You raise me up, so I can stand on mountains"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "You raise me up, to walk on stormy seas"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "You raise me up, to walk on stormy seas"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "raise" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "raise" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "stand" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "stand" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Josh Groban one question about "You Raise Me Up", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Josh Groban sobre "You Raise Me Up", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "You Raise Me Up" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "You Raise Me Up" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "You Raise Me Up" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "You Raise Me Up" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?
